entries.finding: Non-atomic inflight dedup registration at lines 100-114 uses Ref.get() + Map.set() + Ref.set() pattern
entries.detail: Two fibers can both call Ref.get(inflight), both see no pending key, and both start computing. The Deferred.done fix prevents hanging, but both fibers compute the same key.
entries.convention: Ref.modify pattern already used in codebase at acp-next/session.ts lines 119-131 for atomic Map operations with [returnValue, newState] as const
